title: Save schema migration — version-safe upgrades without wipe
problem: When the save schema changes, the current code wipes the entire save rather than migrating. Any schema evolution (new fields, renamed keys, restructured state) silently destroys player progress. A versioned migration system is required before public release.

lineage.spawnReason: deferred critical feature: save migration was explicitly deferred from the initial save/load implementation as a pre-release requirement

analysis: New careerStats fields (stakesCompleted, deepestFloor, dailyStreak, lastRunDate, floorDeaths, studiedBonuses) were added to the CareerStats interface but the v0→v1 migration in persistence.ts only included the original 6 fields. Players loading an old save would get undefined for all new fields, causing runtime errors wherever those fields are accessed.
implementation: Updated the migrate() function in src/services/persistence.ts. In the versionless (v0) branch, added all missing careerStats fields with safe defaults: deepestFloor: 0, lastRunDate: null, dailyStreak: 0, floorDeaths: {}, studiedBonuses: {}, stakesCompleted: {}. Also added stakesCompleted to the endRun() CareerStats object in gameStore.ts where it was missing.

decisions.decision: All new careerStats fields default to zero/empty rather than being marked optional in the interface
decisions.rationale: Keeping CareerStats as a fully required interface forces all write sites to provide values, catching gaps at compile time.

decisions.decision: Migration is one-way (v0 → v1); no downgrade path
decisions.rationale: Downgrading saves would require stripping fields, which is lossy and never needed in practice.

successCriteria: Loading a save that lacks stakesCompleted/deepestFloor/dailyStreak yields valid defaults, not undefined. TypeScript compilation passes with no errors on CareerStats usage. All 244 engine tests pass.
knownLimitations: If new careerStats fields are added in future, the migration must be updated again — no automatic field defaulting
userGuide: Save migration is transparent. Old saves load cleanly and are upgraded in memory on first load. No data is lost.

publicInterface.name: migrate
publicInterface.description: Internal migration function. Upgrades versionless saves to version 1. Returns null if the save is unrecoverable.

implementationNotes: Migration is applied in loadGame() before returning the SaveData to the store
CURRENT_VERSION = 1; future schema changes require bumping this constant and adding a new migration branch

codeSnippets.label: Updated careerStats defaults in migration
codeSnippets.snippet:
careerStats: {
  totalRuns:       raw.careerStats?.totalRuns       ?? 0,
  deepestTier:     raw.careerStats?.deepestTier     ?? 1,
  totalKills:      raw.careerStats?.totalKills      ?? 0,
  bestQuality:     raw.careerStats?.bestQuality     ?? null,
  tiersCleared:    raw.careerStats?.tiersCleared    ?? [],
  ascensions:      raw.careerStats?.ascensions      ?? 0,
  deepestFloor:    raw.careerStats?.deepestFloor    ?? 0,
  lastRunDate:     raw.careerStats?.lastRunDate     ?? null,
  dailyStreak:     raw.careerStats?.dailyStreak     ?? 0,
  floorDeaths:     raw.careerStats?.floorDeaths     ?? {},
  studiedBonuses:  raw.careerStats?.studiedBonuses  ?? {},
  stakesCompleted: raw.careerStats?.stakesCompleted ?? {},
},
